zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Houghton於1358年出生在英國藍卡爾霍格頓時，她的父親Adam de Hoghton49歲，母親Ellen Venables47歲。她於1379年與John Farrington在英國藍卡爾沃爾登 霍爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1410年之後在英國英格蘭藍卡爾沃爾登 霍爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Houghton于1358年出生在英国藍卡爾霍格頓时，她的父亲Adam de Hoghton49岁，母亲Ellen Venables47岁。她于1379年与John Farrington在英国藍卡爾沃爾登 霍爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。她去世于1410年之后在英国英格兰藍卡爾沃爾登 霍爾。

nameMeanings.name: Houghton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of numerous places called Houghton or Hoghton. Most of the placenames derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some have different etymologies; for example, Little Houghton in Eccles (Lancashire), which derives from Old English halh ‘nook, corner of land’ + tūn, and Houghton in Bigbury (Devon), which may derive from an Old English personal name Huhha + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Haughton
meanings: English: habitational name from Haughton (Cheshire, Lancashire, Northumberland, Shropshire, Staffordshire), or Haughton le Skerne (Durham). The placenames derive from Old English halh ‘nook, corner of land’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Houghton .
Irish: adopted for Ó hEacháin ‘descendant of Eachán’, a pet form of the personal name Eachaidh (see Hoey ).
Irish: adopted for Ó hEachtair ‘descendant of Eachtair’, a personal name of uncertain origin. Compare Hoctor .

variants.name: Hufton
meanings: English: habitational name; probably from Stony Houghton in Pleasley (Derbyshire), the name of which derives from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Houghton .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Houghton was born in 1358, in Hoghton, Lancashire, England, her father, Adam de Hoghton, was 49 and her mother, Ellen Venables, was 47. She married John Farrington in 1379, in Worden Hall, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died after 1410, in Worden Hall, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé John Farrington en 1379, à Worden Hall, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée après 1410, à Worden Hall, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Houghtonが1358年にイギリスランカシュアイアホートンで生まれた時，父Adam de Hoghtonは49歳，母Ellen Venablesは47歳であった。1379年にイギリスランカシュアイアウオルデン ハルでJohn Farringtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼女は1410年以後にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアウオルデン ハルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Houghton(이)가 1358년 영국 랭카실르 호그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adam de Hoghton(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellen Venables(은)는 47세였다. 그녀는 1379년 영국 랭카실르 워든 홀에서 John Farrington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1410년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 워든 홀에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Houghton родилась в 1358 г. в местности хогтон, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Adam de Hoghton было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen Venables, 47. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Farrington в 1379 г. в местности ворден холл, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла после 1410 г. в местности ворден холл, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.
